hero.title: Penta P Group
hero.subtitle: Accommodation and warehouse solutions in Ubon Ratchathani, Thailand.
hero.statText: Accommodation, hospitality, residence, and warehouse support under one trusted group.
group.accom.title: Penta P Accommodations
group.accom.subtitle: Conveniently located, clean and comfortable accommodations for long-term stays.

group.ppa.title: Penta P Apartment

group.pph.description: A hospitality experience shaped by comfort, attentive service, and details that make every visit feel effortless.
group.ppr.label: Residence
group.ppr.title: Penta P Residence
group.ppr.description: A polished brand presence that communicates trust, clarity, and a high standard of living experience.

room.ppr.desc.1:
• Fully furnished with both built-in & standalone furniture
  • Bed & mattress
  • Dining table
  • Sofa / couch
  • Wardrobe
  • Shoe rack
  • Shelves
  • Powder table

Kitchen

  • Induction stove
  • Range hood
  • Microwave
  • Fridge
  • Pan, pot, plates, bowls & cutlery
  • Balcony
  • Smart television
  • Air-conditioner
  • Washing machine (in room)
  • Hot water shower
  • Free WiFi (fibre optic)
room.ppr.desc.2:
Safety & Privacy

  • Key card to access the building
  • All units installed with digital lock
  • Remote control for front gate
  • Front gate is always closed
  • Security guard
  • CCTV — surveillance cameras all around the property
